title: meibomia obtusa
intro: Meibomia obtusa, also known as the rough-leaved meadowsweet or butterfly pea, is a perennial plant native to North America that belongs to the pea family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. Meibomia obtusa is believed to provide various health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and supporting the immune system. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat various health conditions and promote overall well-being.
